calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emerson Cervantes, petitioner in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Cervantes reported that he had been working with an attorney to prepare a petition for final distribution. Mr. Cervantes further stated that his father, who had been an heir, had recently passed away in January, and that information regarding the father's assets was still being gathered, which had delayed closing of the estate.

The Court continued the matter to April 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 and directed that a petition for final distribution be filed prior to that date. The Court advised that failure to do so could result in suspension or removal as administrator.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Continued To Feb-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emerson Cervantes, administrator in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

The Court noted that no petition to close the estate had been filed. Mr. Cervantes stated that the petition to close the estate had been prepared, but that additional signatures were required from family members who were currently out of the country. Mr. Cervantes requested additional time to obtain the required signatures and file the petition.

The Court continued the matter to February 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 and directed Mr. Cervantes to file the petition prior to the hearing.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Emerson Cervantes, administrator in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Cervantes explained that he had recently returned from a government work detachment that was affected by a hurricane, which delayed progress. He stated that the only remaining tasks are obtaining a missing W-2 form from a former employer and contacting creditors to arrange for payment from estate funds.

Mr. Cervantes explained that attempts at obtaining the W-2 from the San Francisco Credit Union had been unsuccessful and that the staff there had been unresponsive. He indicated he would be personally visiting the credit union to request the document in person.

The Court reminded Mr. Cervantes to ensure that the waivers from the decedent's parents are filed. Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to January 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Emerson Cervantes appeared via zoom in pro per (petitioner).

Mr. Cervantes stated to the court that he has submitted the inventory and appraisal to the probate referee and is waiting for it to be returned. The matter is continued to November 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by November 03, 2025.

Judge: Josh Fredricks. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Sep-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Emerson Cervantes, in propria persona, Administrator.

At the court's query, Mr. Cervantes offers the court an update regarding the status of the Estate stating that he intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution and requests a continuance to allow him time to finalize and file the petition. The court and Mr. Emerson discuss and confirm a continuance date. The court reminds Mr. Emerson of the several outstanding issues and that the court will be looking for either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq., one week before the next hearing date.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Sep-29-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To Jun-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to in pro per Administrator Emerson Cervantes to appear on Jun-09-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
